parameters.name: TargetClasses
parameters.description: 检测目标类别（逗号分隔，如 person,car），为空则检测所有类别

parameters.name: LabelsPath
parameters.description: 自定义标签文件路径（每行一个标签），为空则使用COCO 80类或自动查找模型目录下的labels.txt

parameters.name: EnableInternalNms
parameters.description: 关闭后输出置信度筛选后的候选框，由下游 BoxNms 负责唯一 NMS。

parameters.name: DetectionMode
parameters.description: 缺陷检测：检出目标视为缺陷(NG)；目标检测：检出目标视为正常(OK)

operators.description: 通用判定逻辑（数量/范围/阈值），输出OK/NG结果

parameters.name: FieldName
parameters.description: 要从上游输入中读取的字段名，如 DefectCount, Distance

parameters.name: ExpectValue
parameters.description: 判定目标值，如 4（螺钉数）、0（缺陷数）、9.5（尺寸下限）

parameters.name: ExpectValueMin
parameters.description: 用于Range条件，设置范围下限

parameters.name: ExpectValueMax
parameters.description: 用于Range条件，设置范围上限

parameters.name: MinConfidence
parameters.description: 置信度低于此值时判定为NG（0表示不检查置信度）

parameters.name: OkOutputValue
parameters.description: 判定为OK时输出的值（用于PLC写入）

parameters.name: NgOutputValue
parameters.description: 判定为NG时输出的值（用于PLC写入）

operators.description: Sorts detections and compares the resulting label order against an expected sequence.

parameters.name: ExpectedLabels
parameters.description: Comma-separated expected labels in order.

parameters.name: SortBy
parameters.description: Field used to sort detections before judging the sequence.

parameters.name: Direction
parameters.description: Ordering direction after sorting.

parameters.name: ExpectedCount
parameters.description: Expected detection count. Use 0 to derive from ExpectedLabels.

parameters.name: MinConfidence
parameters.description: Ignore detections below this confidence before sequence judgment.

parameters.name: AllowMissing
parameters.description: Whether missing expected labels should still be treated as a match.

parameters.name: AllowDuplicate
parameters.description: Whether duplicate labels should still be treated as a match.

operators.description: Adaptive histogram equalization for local contrast enhancement.

parameters.name: ClipLimit
parameters.description: Limits local contrast amplification to avoid excessive noise boosting.

parameters.name: Channel
parameters.description: Auto follows ColorSpace. L/V/Y/All explicitly choose the processing branch.

parameters.name: KernelSize

operators.description: 等待指定时间后继续执行，常用于通信前等待下位机就绪
Detects edge pairs along a scan line and reports width.
Measures width between parallel edges or lines.
Computes perpendicular distance from a point to a line.
Computes distance and angle between two lines.
Runs non-maximum suppression on detection boxes.
Filters detections by area, class, region, or score.
Evaluates focus quality of an image.
Pixel-space ROI offset tool. Use calibration operators before treating the result as physical-world compensation.
Builds affine or perspective calibration from user point pairs.
Loads calibration data from JSON/XML/YAML file.
Converts value between pixel, mm, um and inch.
Measures elapsed and cycle time statistics.
Runs user-defined expression or script snippet.
Generates software, timer, or external triggers.
Pixel-space alignment helper for offsets and repeatability checks. Physical-world interpretation requires calibration.
Pixel-space rigid correction helper. Do not use it as a physical-world conversion substitute without calibration.
Measures spacing using points or image projection.
Unwraps annular image regions into rectangular view.
Corrects uneven illumination by background or model-based methods.
Averages multi-frame input to reduce temporal noise.
Applies 2D affine transform using 3-point or rotate-scale-translate mode.
Measures average Lab/HSV values and computes DeltaE.
Detects surface defects using gradient, reference diff, or local contrast.
Checks edge-pair spacing deviations against expected width.
Detects rectangular/quadrilateral objects from contours.
Fits image-to-robot transform from calibration point pairs.
Detects corner points using Harris or Shi-Tomasi.
Computes line intersection and angle between two lines.
Finds best pair of near-parallel lines in an image.
Finds quadrilateral contours without right-angle constraints.
General geometry measurement between point/line/circle elements.
Stitches two images into a larger panorama-like output.
Splits an image into tiled regions with optional overlap.
Normalizes pixel distribution for robust downstream processing.
Composes multiple images by concat/grid/channel merge.
Pads image border using OpenCV border policies.
Saves text or structured data to text/csv/json file.
Merges/sorts/filters point lists and computes set properties.
Classifies connected blobs by geometric features and draws labels.
Computes histogram and distribution statistics for selected channel.
Computes ROI/masked pixel-level statistics.
Applies mean (box blur) filtering to smooth image noise.
Transforms a base ROI using match pose (CenterX/CenterY/Angle/Scale) and outputs SearchRegion.
Voxel grid downsampling for point clouds (centroid per voxel).
Statistical Outlier Removal (SOR) for point clouds.
RANSAC plane segmentation for point clouds. Outputs plane coefficients and inliers.
Euclidean Cluster Extraction for point clouds (3D connected components by distance).
Compute Point Pair Features (PPF) for a point cloud and build a per-point feature map.
Simplified PPF-based 3D coarse surface matching (model -> scene pose). Intended for coarse pose alignment diagnostics.

parameters.name: Seed
parameters.description: -1 = random sampling (non-deterministic).

operators.description: Apply 5x5 Laws texture filtering and compute local energy.
Compute Gray-Level Co-occurrence Matrix (GLCM) texture features.
Runs an ONNX semantic segmentation model and returns class map, colored visualization, and per-class masks.

parameters.name: InputSize
parameters.description: Width,Height

parameters.name: ClassNames
parameters.description: JSON array or comma-separated names

operators.description: Runs a simplified PatchCore-style anomaly detector with train/inference modes and feature-bank persistence.
Solves eye-in-hand or simplified eye-to-hand calibration from robot poses and calibration-board poses.
Validates a hand-eye calibration matrix and produces quality metrics, HTML report, and pose suggestions.
Calibrates fisheye camera intrinsics and distortion parameters using chessboard or circle grid patterns.
Correct fisheye lens distortion using calibration data with LUT acceleration.
Calibrates stereo camera pair and generates rectification maps for epipolar alignment.
Transforms between pixel coordinates and world plane coordinates using calibration data. Supports both forward (pixel→world) and inverse (world→pixel) transformations.
Feature-based planar matching with homography verification. Suitable for textured planar targets under perspective change.
Experimental local deformable matching with verified rigid fallback and multi-candidate suppression.
Computes the distance from each pixel to the nearest zero pixel. Supports multiple distance metrics and signed distances.
Computes minimum enclosing geometry (circle, rectangle, triangle) and robust arc fitting with RANSAC.
Erodes a region using a specified structuring element (Region-based morphology).
Dilates a region using a specified structuring element (Region-based morphology).
Opening operation (erosion followed by dilation) for noise removal and smooth region boundaries.
Closing operation (dilation followed by erosion) for filling small holes and connecting nearby regions.
Extracts skeleton using Zhang-Suen thinning algorithm. Preserves topology and connectivity.
Computes the union of two regions (A ∪ B).
Computes the intersection of two regions (A ∩ B).
Computes the difference of two regions (A - B).
Computes the complement of a region relative to an image size.
Detects edges along an arc path with subpixel accuracy.
Finds extremal points of a contour in specified directions.
Performs 1D Fast Fourier Transform on input signal or image rows/columns.
Applies frequency domain filters (low-pass, high-pass, band-pass, band-stop) to spectrum.
Performs 1D Inverse Fast Fourier Transform to convert frequency spectrum back to time domain.
Computes phase closure by unwrapping wrapped phase from interferometric measurements.
